property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: defaultSchedulingType
property.label: Default Scheduling Type
property.description: Default scheduling type. Should be either Facility or Faculty.

property.name: defaultCalendarView
property.label: Default Calendar View
property.description: Default view for the calendar. Supported values are: resourceTimelineDay, resourceTimelineWeek, resourceTimelineMonth.

property.name: calendarHeaderButtonLeft
property.label: Calendar Header Button Left
property.description: Calendar buttons name in comma/space separated e.g, button1,button2. Supported values are: today, resourceTimelineDay, resourceTimelineWeek, resourceTimelineMonth, cJumpToDate, prev, next, title.

property.name: calendarHeaderButtonCenter
property.label: Calendar Header Button Center
property.description: Calendar buttons name in comma/space separated e.g, button1,button2. Supported values are: today, resourceTimelineDay, resourceTimelineWeek, resourceTimelineMonth, cJumpToDate, prev, next, title.

property.name: calendarHeaderButtonRight
property.label: Calendar Header Button Right
property.description: Calendar buttons name in comma/space separated e.g, button1,button2. Supported values are: today, resourceTimelineDay, resourceTimelineWeek, resourceTimelineMonth, cJumpToDate, prev, next, title.

property.name: slotLabelFormat1
property.label: Slot Label Format 1
property.description: Timeline slot label formatting. Please refer to moment.js documentation.

property.name: slotLabelFormat2
property.label: Slot Label Format 2
property.description: Timeline slot formatting. Please refer to moment.js documentation.

property.name: slotLabelFormat3
property.label: Slot Label Format 3
property.description: Timeline slot formatting. Please refer to moment.js documentation.

property.name: timelineMinTime
property.label: Timeline First Hour
property.description: Determines the first hour/time that will be displayed, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way up. e.g., 07:00 = 7AM.

property.name: timelineMaxTime
property.label: Timeline Last Hour
property.description: Determines the last hour/time (exclusively) that will be displayed, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way down. e.g., 19:00 = 7PM.

property.name: timelineSlotWidth
property.label: Timeline slot width (pixel)
property.description: Timeline slot width in pixel.

property.name: resourceAreaWidth
property.label: Resource panel width (percent)
property.description: Resource panel width in percent.

property.name: useIsoWeek
property.label: Use ISO Week
property.description: Tick to use ISO week number.

property.name: calendarSnapDuration
property.label: Calendar Snap Duration
property.description: The hour:minute value to snap blocks to when dragging. MUST BE IN HH:MM FORMAT e.g. 00:30

property.name: calendarSlotDuration
property.label: Calendar Slot Duration
property.description: The frequency for displaying time slots. MUST BE IN HH:MM FORMAT e.g. 00:30

property.name: facultyContactNameFormat
property.label: Faculty Display Name Format
property.description: Faculty display name merge field format, support fields in contact.

property.name: facultyContactDefaultCriteria
property.label: Faculty Contact Default Criteria
property.description: The filter criteria to be considered for faculty (Contact Type = Faculty), e.g, MyFieldA__c = 'A' AND MyFieldB__c = 'B'.

property.name: facilityNameFormat
property.label: Facility Display Name Format
property.description: Facility display name merge field format, support fields in facility.

property.name: facilityDefaultCriteria
property.label: Facility Default Criteria
property.description: The filter criteria to be considered for facility (Active = true), e.g, MyFieldA__c = 'A' AND MyFieldB__c = 'B'.

property.name: studySessionNameFormat
property.label: Study Session Display Name Format
property.description: Study Session display name merge field format, support fields in session.

property.name: studySessionDefaultCriteria
property.label: Study Session Default Criteria
property.description: The filter criteria to be considered for Study Session, e.g, MyFieldA__c = 'A' AND MyFieldB__c = 'B'.

property.name: studyEventInfoFields
property.label: Study Event Info Fields
property.description: The fields of Study Events to be displayed on the Study Event Info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studySessionFilterFields
property.label: Study Session Filter Fields
property.description: Study Session Fields to filter study sessions in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studySessionGroupByFields
property.label: Study Session Group By Fields
property.description: Study Session Fields to group study sessions in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: facultyContactFilterFields
property.label: Faculty Contact Filter Fields
property.description: Contact Fields to filter faculty contacts in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: facilityFilterFields
property.label: Facility Filter Fields
property.description: Facility Fields to filter facilities in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: allowCrossCampusFacilityAllocation
property.label: Allow Cross Campus Facility Allocation
property.description: Allow/prevent users to allocate Study Events to facilities across different campuses.

property.name: respectResourceAvailability
property.label: Respect Resource Availability
property.description: Tick to highlight resource availability in scheduler.

property.name: resourceAvailabilityBackgroundColor
property.label: Resource Availability Background Colour
property.description: The background colour to represent the availability of the resources.

property.name: hiddenEventBackgroundColor
property.label: Hidden Event Colour
property.description: The colour of the hidden events.

property.name: allowNewSession
property.label: Allow New Study Session
property.description: Tick to allow new Study Session Creation.

property.name: allowEditSession
property.label: Allow Edit Study Session
property.description: Tick to allow Study Session Modification.

property.name: editFormStudySessionFieldSetName
property.label: Study Session Field Set Name (Edit Form)
property.description: The study session field set API name for record edit form.

property.name: editFormStudySessionTimeFieldSetName
property.label: Study Session Time Field Set Name (Edit Form)
property.description: The study session time field set API name for record edit form.

property.name: editFormSseColumnNo
property.label: Study Session Column Number (Edit Form)
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: editFormSstColumnNo
property.label: Study Session Time Column Number (Edit Form)
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: accordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Accordion Background Color
property.description: Accordion backgound color in hex code. e.g., #cccccc.

property.name: accordionTextColor
property.label: Accordion Text Color
property.description: Accordion text color in hex code. e.g., #000000.

property.name: accordionButtonVariant
property.label: Accordion Button Variant
property.description: Accordion button appearance.

property.name: allowDeleteSession
property.label: Allow Delete Study Session
property.description: Tick to allow Study Session Deletion.

property.name: allowFacilityAssignment
property.label: Allow Facility Assignment
property.description: Tick to allow facilities assignment to Study Session.

property.name: allowFacultyContactAssignment
property.label: Allow Faculty Contact Assignment
property.description: Tick to allow faculties assignment to Study Session.

property.name: allowPreviewSession
property.label: Allow Preview Study Session
property.description: Tick to allow user to preview Study Session.

property.name: enableStickyPreview
property.label: Sticky Preview Panel
property.description: Make the preview panel sticky to the scheduler header during scrolling. Please note that you won't be able to allocate the Study Event from preview to a resource when the preview panel is in sticky mode.

property.name: allowSendAnnouncement
property.label: Allow Send Announcement
property.description: Tick to allow user to send announcement.

property.name: allowCustomAction
property.label: Allow Custom Action
property.description: Tick to allow user to use custom action.

property.name: customActionLabel
property.label: Custom Action Label
property.description: Label for the custom action.

property.name: customActionFlowName
property.label: Custom Action Flow Name
property.description: The API name for the screen flow.

property.name: customActionFlowFinishBehavior
property.label: Custom Action Flow Finish Behavior
property.description: The finish behavior for the screen flow. Supported options are: NONE, RESTART.

property.name: customActionShowCloseButton
property.label: Custom Action Show Close Button
property.description: Show close button on the custom action modal.

property.name: tableTextDisplayMode
property.label: Table Text Display Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Wrap Text, Clip Text.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Enable Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.
